_comment: FROZEN CONTRACT — the 404 detail a client receives when it targets a persona that exists locally but is NOT published to the provider API (shared_api.enabled=false). The 'code' string persona_unpublished is what clients branch on. Private mirroring to the owner must never turn this into a success for external clients. Shape captured verbatim from _resolve_published_persona in openai_compat_endpoint.py.

error.message: Persona 'Private Financial Assistant' is not published to the shared API.
